div.p: Explore our latest thought leadership, ideas, and insights on the issues that are shaping the future of business and society.

div.p: Choose a partner with intimate knowledge of your industry and first-hand experience of defining its future.
Discover our portfolio – constantly evolving to keep pace with the ever-changing needs of our clients.
Become part of a diverse collective of free-thinkers, entrepreneurs and experts – and help us to make a difference.
See our latest news, and stories from across the business, and explore our archives.
We are a global leader in partnering with companies to transform and manage their business by harnessing the power of technology.

a.aria-label: More insights about Latest Insights Invent
Navy Federal Credit Union transforms its legacy back-office processes by harnessing AI

div.h3: Navy Federal Credit Union transforms its legacy back-office processes by harnessing AI
div.p: The firm teamed up with Capgemini to modernize outdated systems, redesign workflows, and drive efficiencies – all while improving its employees’ experience

a.aria-label: Read more about Navy Federal Credit Union transforms its legacy back-office processes by harnessing AI
Making autonomous networks real: Vodafone’s journey to self-healing networks

div.h3: Making autonomous networks real: Vodafone’s journey to self-healing networks
div.p: Vodafone partnered with Capgemini to assess its automation maturity and co-design a long-term roadmap to accelerate the journey towards Level 4 Autonomous Network across its markets

a.aria-label: Read more about Making autonomous networks real: Vodafone’s journey to self-healing networks
A crucial step toward 6G infrastructure for immersive, interoperable, and human-centered communication

div.h3: A crucial step toward 6G infrastructure for immersive, interoperable, and human-centered communication
div.p: Extended Reality (XR) services face limitations from today’s networks. To address this, a research consortium that includes Capgemini launched the 6G-XR project to orchestrate network resources and harness 6G enablers

a.aria-label: Read more about A crucial step toward 6G infrastructure for immersive, interoperable, and human-centered communication

a.h3: Two-thirds of organizations rate physical AI as a high priority for the next three to five years
Change in the composition of Capgemini’s Board of Directors proposed to the 2026 Shareholders’ Meeting
85% of banks’ corporate clients plan to engage with a non-bank financial institution within the next year as competition with private capital intensifies
Capgemini to acquire leading independent product lifecycle management and industrial digitalization specialist, Piterion

div.p: Helping conversationists conduct genetic analysis in the field to protect vulnerable species
A joined-up approach to reducing businesses’ carbon footprints
How AI and cloud technology could help speed up medical diagnoses
